title: Quit Smoking: Awareness resources - Canada.ca
content:
## Prevention and quitting smoking resources
- Provincial and territorial quit services
- Prevention and quitting smoking resources
- Sharing information about quitting smoking
- Posts to share on social media
- Digital banners for your website and newsletters
- Products to print, display and distribute

## Sharing information about quitting smoking
Our resources include empowering testimonials of people who have successfully quit smoking, as well as other resources that encourage quitting and that inform about the risks of tobacco use.
These resources reinforce that quitting is possible and that combining effective approaches improves the chances of success. There is no wrong way to quit when choosing from the array of evidence-based quit smoking tools and supports.
- increase awareness about the dangers of tobacco use
- inspire reflection and action by sharing testimonials of real people who have successfully quit smoking
- raise awareness of the array and effectiveness of quit smoking aids
- promote the combination of tools and support for increased success of quitting
- encourage the development of a personalized quit smoking plan
This will help people in Canada make informed decisions around the use of tobacco and provide information and resources to help people quit smoking.
We hope you will share these tools and resources:
- through newsletters and emails
- in other communications activities
- within clinical practices

## Posts to share on social media
Anne-Marie quit smoking. It was one step at a time, and it worked.
Combining the right tools and support can improve your chances of quitting smoking. Learn more: Canada.ca/quit-smoking
Combining the right tools and support can improve your chances of quitting smoking.
Learn more: Canada.ca/quit-smoking
